summaryPatterns: I'm a Manual QA Engineer with 4+ years of experience in testing web applications, REST API, and microservices architecture. Covered 600+ test cases and reduced critical defects by 20%.
I'm a QA professional with 3+ years in fintech and e-commerce testing. Prevented 200+ critical bugs from reaching production and accelerated regression testing by 30%.
I'm a Senior QA Engineer with 7+ years of experience in high-load systems testing. Built comprehensive testing processes from scratch and reduced bug localization time by 25%.
I'm a QA Tester with 4 years in microservices testing. Established testing documentation standards and decreased onboarding time for new QA specialists by 50%.
achievementPhrases: Prevented 200+ critical bugs from reaching production
Accelerated onboarding process by 50% for new QA specialists
Covered 600+ test cases for core product functionality
Optimized testing processes and reduced regression time by 20%
Structured 350+ test cases and improved navigation in test base
Built comprehensive testing documentation from scratch
Reduced critical defects in financial calculations by 15%
Established testing standards that decreased onboarding from 2 to 1 month
Created automated Postman collections serving 7+ team members
Improved release stability through structured regression sets
Reduced production incidents by implementing shift-left testing approach
keyResponsibilities: Conduct functional, integration, and regression testing of web applications
Test REST API endpoints using Postman and Swagger documentation
Validate data consistency between UI, API, and database layers
Create and maintain comprehensive test documentation and test cases
Analyze application logs and troubleshoot issues using monitoring tools
Collaborate with development teams to reproduce and resolve defects
Participate in requirements analysis and test planning activities
Execute cross-browser and mobile application testing
Perform database validation using SQL queries
Support release cycles and conduct smoke testing on different environments
redFlags: Listing generic phrases without specific metrics or achievements
Mentioning more than 40 technologies without context
Focusing only on tools without describing testing methodologies
Not mentioning collaboration with development teams
Lack of specific examples of testing types performed
Missing database testing experience for backend-heavy roles
No mention of API testing experience in modern applications
notes: Manual QA тестировщик — это специалист, который обеспечивает качество программных продуктов через ручное тестирование. Ключевые особенности роли: обязательное знание API-тестирования (Postman, Swagger), работа с базами данных через SQL, понимание микросервисной архитектуры и интеграций. Современный QA должен уметь работать с логами (Kibana, Grafana), очередями сообщений (Kafka), контейнеризацией (Docker, Kubernetes). Важны навыки кроссфункционального взаимодействия с разработчиками, аналитиками, DevOps. Типичные проекты: банковские системы, e-commerce платформы, финтех продукты. Карьерный рост: Junior → Middle → Senior → Lead QA или переход в автоматизацию тестирования. Зарплатные ожидания растут с опытом и глубиной технических знаний. Важные soft skills: внимание к деталям, системное мышление, коммуникабельность.
